evals.prompt: I need to start working on Jira ticket OF-TD-142. It's a new feature for vendor onboarding. Create a branch for me.
evals.expected_output: Creates a branch named feature/OF-TD-142-vendor-onboarding from latest main, pushes it to remote with tracking

assertions.name: correct_branch_naming
assertions.text: Branch name follows the format: feature/OF-TD-142-<description>

assertions.name: branches_from_main
assertions.text: Fetches latest main and creates branch from origin/main

assertions.name: pushes_with_tracking
assertions.text: Pushes the branch with -u flag for tracking

evals.prompt: I've finished my changes on the vendor onboarding feature (OF-TD-142). Create a PR for it targeting main. I want borismassesa to review it.
evals.expected_output: Creates a PR with Jira ticket link, proper template, type of change, and assigns borismassesa as reviewer

assertions.name: jira_link_included
assertions.text: PR body includes Jira link to https://opusfesta.atlassian.net/browse/OF-TD-142

assertions.name: uses_pr_template
assertions.text: PR body includes the template sections (Summary, Type of Change, Checklist)

evals.prompt: Help me set up the CI/CD pipeline for our repo. I need GitHub Actions, CodeRabbit, and branch protection on main.
evals.expected_output: Creates/verifies ci.yml workflow, .coderabbitai.yaml config, and sets up branch protection rules with the setup script

assertions.name: ci_workflow_created
assertions.text: Creates or references .github/workflows/ci.yml with lint, type-check, and build jobs

assertions.name: coderabbit_configured
assertions.text: Creates or references .coderabbitai.yaml with proper OpusFesta settings

assertions.name: branch_protection_setup
assertions.text: Sets up or references branch protection with required checks and 1 approval
